m2614.description: JIT access auto-revoker (Element 5 L4): every 15 minutes, finds m2614-jit-grants documents with status=active whose expires_at has passed, deletes the backing role mapping (m2614-jit-{grant_id}) — which revokes the role instantly across all realms — and writes a status=expired audit record. Grants are role mappings, not user edits, so revocation is a single idempotent DELETE and never touches passwords. Deploy via scripts/deploy.py which substitutes __ES_HOST__/__KIBANA_HOST__/__AUTH_HEADER__ tokens.

script.source: def mappings = []; def expiredDocs = []; for (def h : ctx.payload.hits.hits) { def src = h['_source']; String grantId = src['grant_id'] != null ? src['grant_id'].toString() : h['_id'].toString(); String mapping = src['role_mapping_name'] != null ? src['role_mapping_name'].toString() : 'm2614-jit-' + grantId; mappings.add(mapping); expiredDocs.add(['_id': h['_id'], '@timestamp': ctx.execution_time, 'grant_id': grantId, 'username': src['username'], 'role': src['role'], 'role_mapping_name': mapping, 'case_id': src['case_id'], 'granted_by': src['granted_by'], 'granted_at': src['granted_at'], 'expires_at': src['expires_at'], 'status': 'expired', 'revoked_at': ctx.execution_time, 'revoked_by': 'm2614-jit-expiry watcher', 'justification': src['justification']]); } return ['mappings': mappings, 'expired_docs': expiredDocs, 'expired_count': expiredDocs.size()];
